title: Gas Service Payment Assistance * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Gas Service Payment Assistance * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF GRAND RONDE LIHEAP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to offset electric, natural gas, and heating fuel (oil, wood, propane, pellets). LIHEAP payments will be counted as utility assistance through the Social Services Emergency Assistance Program. If applicants have received LIHEAP funds as of October 1 through another agency, they are ineligible to apply. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: -Members of the Confederated Tribes of Grand Ronde (CTGR) with household income at or below 60% median income -Adult Tribal Members name (adult CTGR tribal member who lives in the home) must be on billing statement or Authorized User on utility account -If no adult Tribal Member is in the home, family can still apply if there is a CTGR Tribal Member youth in the home. Must provide documentation of child living in the home. Hours: Website: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Program runs from October 1 until the last week of May or until capacity is reached Email (503) 879-2034 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF GRAND RONDE LIHEAP
